2605.19767.title: AR1-ZO: Topology-Aware Rank-1 Zeroth-Order Queries for High-Rank LoRA Fine-Tuning
2605.19767.paper_summary: Zeroth-order (ZO) optimization enables large-language-model fine-tuning without storing backpropagation activations, while LoRA supplies compact trainable adapters. Combining them creates a rank paradox: increasing LoRA rank improves adapter capacity, but standard two-point ZO either perturbs a rank-dependent number of coordinates or, under atomwise updates, can make the finite-difference signal unobservable. This paper shows that the bottleneck is a measurement-topology problem rather than a need for an external subspace. LoRA already decomposes into matched rank-$1$ atoms, each a complete factor-coordinate block of dimension $d_\text{out}+d_\text{in}$. Querying one atom per step keeps the stored adapter rank $r$ while removing $r$ from the single-query perturbation dimension. The naive atomwise query is still miscalibrated: if it inherits canonical LoRA scaling $α/r$, the active finite-difference signal shrinks as $1/r$ and the active finite-difference signal-to-noise ratio (FD-SNR) as $1/r^2$, producing directional collapse under a fixed residual evaluation-noise floor. AR1-ZO pairs alternating rank-$1$ atom queries with topology-aware scaling $γ=αr$, restoring rank-invariant active signal without auxiliary bases, activation hooks, curvature estimates, or extra forward queries. Theory proves atom minimality, rank-independent active query dimension, directional collapse and restoration, and the remaining rank dependence as an amortized coverage cost. Experiments on OPT and Qwen3 models validate the signal mechanism and show that AR1-ZO makes high-rank LoRA effective among matched-budget ZO methods under the standard two-forward-pass query budget.
2605.19767.paper_summary_zh: 零階（ZO）優化使得大型語言模型的微調無需儲存反向傳播的激活，而 LoRA 提供了緊湊的可訓練適配器。<lb/>將它們結合起來會產生一個秩悖論：增加 LoRA 的秩會提高適配器的容量，但標準的兩點 ZO 要麼擾動一個依賴於秩的坐標數量，要麼在原子更新下，會使有限差分信號變得不可觀察。<lb/>本文顯示瓶頸是一個測量拓撲問題，而不是對外部子空間的需求。<lb/>LoRA 已經分解為匹配的秩-$1$ 原子，每個原子都是維度為 $d_\text{out}+d_\text{in}$ 的完整因子坐標塊。<lb/>每步查詢一個原子可以保持儲存的適配器秩 $r$，同時從單次查詢擾動維度中移除 $r$。<lb/>天真的原子查詢仍然校準不當：如果它繼承了經典的 LoRA 縮放 $α/r$，則活躍的有限差分信號會縮小為 $1/r$，而活躍的有限差分信號對噪聲比（FD-SNR）則縮小為 $1/r^2$，在固定的殘差評估噪聲底線下產生方向性崩潰。<lb/>AR1-ZO 將交替的秩-$1$ 原子查詢與考慮拓撲的縮放 $γ=αr$ 結合，恢復了不需要輔助基、激活鉤、曲率估計或額外前向查詢的秩不變的活躍信號。<lb/>理論證明了原子的最小性、與秩無關的活躍查詢維度、方向性崩潰和恢復，以及剩餘的秩依賴作為攤銷的覆蓋成本。<lb/>在 OPT 和 Qwen3 模型上的實驗驗證了信號機制，並顯示 AR1-ZO 在標準的兩次前向傳遞查詢預算下，使高秩 LoRA 在匹配預算的 ZO 方法中變得有效。
2605.19767.author: Ziye Chen et.al.
2605.19767.authors: Ziye Chen, Hongbin Lin, Chenyu Zhang, Xiangda Yan, Yongjie Yang, Yao Shu
